/usr/bin/ar qc libabstractions.a CMakeFiles/abstractions.dir/abstractions/src/Initializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abstractions.dir/abstractions/src/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abstractions.dir/abstractions/src/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abstractions.dir/abstractions/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abstractions.dir/abstractions/src/Texture2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abstractions.dir/abstractions/src/Texture3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abstractions.dir/abstractions/src/TextureCubeMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/abstractions.dir/abstractions/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/abstractions.dir/abstractions/src/stb_image_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libabstractions.a
